ques: Browse the Coursera website and find the price required for one year of Coursera Plus. How much is the discount? Then list 3 companies that work with Coursera.
answer: One year of Coursera Plus (Annual) costs €204.60/year, discounted from the original €341/year — a 40% discount (saving €136.40). Three companies that work with Coursera: IBM, Microsoft, and Google (Meta is also a partner).
